channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wide pothole, 15th June
item.description:
Around no 48

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Langdale Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Large deep pothole on then entrance to the layby off a 60mph road. The entrance to the layby is littered with potholes, 15th June
item.description:
Location is at the entrance to the layby off the A435 southbound by Oxenton between Aston Cross and Bishops Cleeve. Co-ordinates: 51.982023, -2.071697. Pothole is dangerous as you are coming off a 60mph road. Caused damage and buckled front alloy wheel on car.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Oxenton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 15th June
item.description:
If they could please concentrate on the top of the road as you turn in from Evesham Road. Following a site visit and reports from the County Councillor, we attended site on Friday and there were quite a few areas which look to meet intervention. We had to raise a 2hr on one of them on Friday.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 15th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and reset x1 sunken gully fame and lid stats required 400x330x45mm (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway closure footway aburt level difference 1200x400x25mm tarmac parch (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 15th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and replace x1 broken rocking dropped kerb stone kerb 900x100x40mm stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 15th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and relay x1 raised edgeing stone 450x50mm x25mm stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th June
item.description:
ENWD with road closure please cut broken branch and remove (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 15th June
item.description:
Please jet the gullies as per the plan. This may require the small jetter
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The streetname plate (plus 61/59/57) Alma Road has been missing for years and they, 15th June
item.description:
Taxi drivers and deliveries are struggling to find these properties on Alma Road and there used to be additional signage on the corner. Resident have visual impairment and relies on these services so please can this sign be reinstated in a suitable location. I would appreciate a call to discuss please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Alma Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 15th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and relay x1 sunken kerb stone 900x100x40mm stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th June
item.description:
ENWD with road closure please cut back overgrown leaning tree obstructing CW to boundary (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 15th June
item.description:
2x gullies on entrance. both on DYL's so access should not be an issue (Blocked Gully/Kerb Offlet)
Report on FixMyStreet
